description: Repos promoted into the ranked value tier - discovered to hold concrete, build-out-worthy latent value.

ranked.value: Reusable live co-creation engine for audience-participatory performance: a real-time consensus backplane with performer override, deployable WebSocket server, tested weighting/bus logic, and a generative-music proof path that can become a publishable arts/education/venue demo.
ranked.first_task: Ship a reproducible alpha demo that starts the core engine plus the generative-music audience/performer flow from a fresh install, passes the core-engine consensus/bus tests in CI, and documents the exact local-to-venue runbook as the first publishable package boundary.
